response.original_title: ちょびっツ 日比谷・琴子 語る
response.overview: While preparing a celebration party for Hideki (assuming he passes his college entrance exams) Hibiya speaks with Kotoko (a laptop persocom) and reflects over the events of the series. Meanwhile Hideki and Chii are off to check Hideki’s score on the college entrance exams.
response.title: ちょびっツ 日比谷・琴子 語る
